brand.name: Innerawake
brand.description: Awaken your calm with guided meditations, breathing exercises, and sleep stories.

metrics.subtitle: Small daily practices can create measurable change in how you feel, sleep, and focus.

onboarding.step4_body: Innerawake has helped thousands of people reduce stress and sleep better.
